prestazioni: AMG M139 2.0L Inline-4 (engine code: M139 DE20 AL) – Full Weistec Engineering Stage 3+ turbo upgrade with Garrett GTX5533R Gen II turbocharger (84mm billet compressor wheel, 106mm turbine, 1.28 A/R housing), Weistec billet aluminum intake manifold, and Weistec 900HP fuel system (dual Bosch Motorsport 044 high-flow fuel pumps, 1000cc injectors, and upgraded fuel pressure regulator).

KW Suspension Clubsport coilovers (3-way adjustable damping, 400lb front springs, 600lb rear springs) with custom valving for the GLA45 S’s MacPherson strut front and multi-link rear suspension, paired with H&R Monoball subframe bushings and polyurethane control arm bushings for razor-sharp turn-in.

AP Racing Radi-CAL 6-piston front brake kit (405mm two-piece rotors with directional vane cooling, RS.62 pads) and 4-piston rear kit (380mm rotors, RS.42 pads), combined with Motul RBF 660 brake fluid and Goodridge G-Stop stainless steel brake lines for fade-free stopping power.
estetica: Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit (carbon fiber fenders, front bumper, and rear diffuser) with custom 3M Matte Graphite vinyl wrap and exposed carbon fiber weave on the hood and roof for weight reduction and aggressive stance.

OEM+ AMG Night Package II (gloss black 21-inch AMG forged wheels with Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires – 255/35R21 front, 285/30R21 rear) and custom HRE FF01 flow-formed wheels (22x9.5 +25 front, 22x11 +30 rear) for track use with Pirelli P Zero Trofeo R semi-slicks.

Seibon Carbon fiber GT-style rear wing (3D-scanned to fit the GLA45 S’s roofline) with integrated Gurney flap and adjustable angle of attack (0-15 degrees), paired with a custom front splitter from Vorsteiner (carbon fiber, 3-piece design with removable dive planes) for balanced aero at high speeds.
